name: Jalapeno Cornbread Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a heavy skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
3. Add onion, celery, jalapeno and garlic; sauté until softened.
4. Add thyme and salt; cook for another minute or so.
5. In a large bowl, mix cornbread with 2 cups stock. If the mixture is too dry, add more stock until it is very moist but not soupy.
6. Spoon the mixture into a buttered 2-quart oven-safe pan or casserole.
7. Bake for 30 minutes or until firm.
